howToPlaySlide1Body: A card game for climbing gyms. Add players, choose a mode and customize the cards. Each turn you'll see a challenge: swipe right if you complete it or left if you don't.
howToPlaySlide2Body: Each card has points, difficulty and tries. Completing adds points; failing penalizes. The player with the most points at the end of the rounds wins.
howToPlaySlide3Body: Choose who plays, the mode (Infinite, All vs all, Teams or All to one), filter by categories and difficulty, and start!
modeInfiniteDesc: No round limit. Play until you want to stop.
modeAllVsAllDesc: Each player accumulates points. Whoever has the most at the end wins.
modeTeamsDesc: Form teams and add up the team's points.
modeAllToOneDesc: Everyone attempts the same challenge each round.
modeDueloDesc: Everyone at once. If it's done, everyone gets points.
modeTwisterDesc: Climb by colors! Each player gets a different color each round. You cannot repeat what someone else already climbed.
modeSpeedrunDesc: Quick! You have limited time to complete each challenge. If the timer reaches zero, you fail automatically.
